primary_angle.title: The Royal Pop was never meant for the wrist — until now
primary_angle.core_message: Introducing the Cradle Adapter V1: a precision-engineered conversion kit that turns your Royal Pop into a wristwatch without compromising its design. Reversible, non-invasive, and built for daily wear.
primary_angle.why_this_wins: Directly addresses the core audience tension: the Royal Pop is a pocket watch, not a wristwatch. Positions Pop Wrist Studio as the engineering-led solution, differentiating from low-cost 3D-printed alternatives.
primary_angle.audience: Royal Pop owners and design-led accessory buyers who want a wearable, premium solution without damaging the original product.
primary_angle.desired_reaction: This is the solution I’ve been waiting for — it actually fits and looks intentional.

supporting_angle.title: Why material and tolerances matter in a Royal Pop adapter
supporting_angle.purpose: Reinforce premium positioning by highlighting FKM rubber, 40.35mm inner socket, and 0.7mm retaining lip — key differentiators from generic straps and 3D-printed kits. Addresses the fear of poor fit or damage.

content_decision.goal: Showcase the Cradle Adapter V1’s engineering precision and material authenticity through a side-by-side comparison of the Royal Pop as a pocket watch vs. wristwatch with the adapter.
content_decision.hook_direction: Start with the problem: 'The Royal Pop is a design icon, but it’s not a wristwatch.' Then reveal the adapter as the solution with close-up shots of tolerances and material.
content_decision.conversion_role: Drive waitlist sign-ups by positioning the adapter as the only premium, reversible solution for daily wear.

creative_direction.pace: Slow, deliberate, with emphasis on precision details
creative_direction.visual_energy: High contrast between the Royal Pop’s original form and its wrist-mounted version. Close-ups of the adapter’s fit, material texture, and reversible design.
must_show: Royal Pop in pocket vs. on wrist with adapter
Close-up of 40.35mm inner socket and 0.7mm retaining lip
All 8 colourways in a quick montage
must_not_do: Use hypebro language or fake urgency
Compare directly to 3D-printed kits (imply inferiority without naming)
Show the adapter as a permanent modification
Use generic waitlist language (e.g., 'sign up now!')

success_metric.secondary: Engagement rate (likes, shares, saves) on engineering details and colourway reveal

brief_for_copy.script_goal: Explain the problem (Royal Pop as a pocket watch), introduce the Cradle Adapter V1 as the solution, and highlight engineering precision and material authenticity. End with a clear CTA to join the waitlist.
brief_for_copy.caption_goal: Reinforce the adapter’s reversible, non-invasive design and premium positioning. Include a subtle nod to scarcity (e.g., 'Limited first batch').
brief_for_copy.cta_language: Join the waitlist to be first in line for the Cradle Adapter V1. Link in bio.
proof_points_to_include: 0.7mm retaining lip to secure the Royal Pop
FKM rubber for durability and grip
